subject: Cannot reset my password
body: I clicked 'Forgot Password' and entered my email but I never receive the reset link. I have checked spam and waited an hour. My account email is the one I used to open this ticket.

subject: Need to change account email address
body: I changed jobs and need to update the email on my account from my old work address to my personal email. I still have access to the old email to verify.

subject: Unexpected charge after cancellation
body: I cancelled my account two weeks ago and received a confirmation email, yet I was still charged this month. Please reverse this charge immediately.

subject: Package arrived damaged
body: The box arrived today but it was clearly damaged in transit — one corner is completely crushed and the item inside is broken. I have taken photos. What is the process for a replacement?

subject: Login page keeps redirecting to itself
body: When I try to log in I enter my credentials and the page just refreshes and shows the login form again. I never get into my account. I have cleared cache and cookies.

subject: Multiple accounts merged without permission
body: It looks like my personal and company accounts were merged. I now see data from both in one dashboard which is a serious privacy issue. Please separate them immediately.

subject: Sync not working between mobile and desktop
body: My data on the mobile app is not syncing with the desktop version. I added 15 items on my phone today and none of them appear when I log in from my computer.

subject: Cannot update payment method
body: I am trying to update my credit card but the payment page keeps showing an error: 'Unable to save card'. I have tried three different browsers and it still fails.

subject: Auto-renewal turned on without my consent
body: I did not authorize auto-renewal on my account. I see it was enabled last month and I was charged. I would like a refund and to turn off auto-renewal.

subject: Exchange instead of refund not processed
body: I asked for an exchange for a different size, not a refund. The agent I chatted with confirmed an exchange. However I received a refund to my original payment and no replacement was sent.

subject: SSO login not working with our identity provider
body: We configured SAML SSO with our company's Okta instance following your documentation. When users try to log in via SSO they get a generic error page after being redirected back.

subject: Order shipped to wrong country
body: My order was shipped to Germany but I am in Canada. I double-checked my account and my address shows Canada. This seems like a system error on your end.

subject: Compatibility with Windows 11
body: Before purchasing I want to confirm the desktop application is fully compatible with Windows 11. Are there any known issues with the latest Windows update?

subject: What file formats can I import?
body: I have data in multiple formats: CSV, Excel, and JSON. Can your import feature handle all three? Are there any row or file size limits I should be aware of?

subject: Teammate cannot accept invitation
body: I sent an invitation to a colleague three days ago. She received the email but when she clicks the link it says 'Invitation expired or invalid'. Can you resend or generate a new link?

subject: Invoice shows wrong amount
body: The invoice I received for last month shows $149 but my plan is $99/month. I have not added any extra services. Please correct this.

subject: Refund to wrong card
body: My original card was cancelled and I got a new one with a different number. The refund was sent to the old cancelled card. How can we redirect it to my current card?

subject: Wrong shipping address used on my order
body: I noticed after placing the order that the wrong address was used — it went to my old address. The order number is #ORD-44291. Can this still be changed?

subject: Package not delivered but marked as delivered
body: My tracking shows the package was delivered yesterday but nothing arrived. My neighbor did not receive it either. Could you help locate it or start a claim?

subject: Refund not received after 10 days
body: You approved my refund on the 5th of this month (confirmation #RF-8821) but I have not seen the credit on my statement yet. My bank says no pending credit from you.

subject: How do I transfer account ownership?
body: Our original account owner has left the company. I am the new IT administrator and need to become the account owner. I have the original owner's work email if that helps.

subject: Search returns no results for any query
body: The search feature has not been returning any results since yesterday afternoon. I searched for terms I know exist in my data and got 0 results every time.

subject: Refund issued for wrong amount
body: I returned two items totaling $87. The refund posted to my card was $52. I need the remaining $35 refunded as well. My return confirmation is #RET-1190.

subject: Is there an offline mode?
body: I often work in locations with poor internet connectivity. Is there a way to use the product offline and sync when connectivity is restored?

subject: How do I start a return?
body: I received my order last week but it is not what I expected. I would like to return it. I could not find a return option in my account. What is the process?

subject: Delivery requires signature but I will not be home
body: My tracking shows a signature is required for delivery but I will be at work. I tried to use the carrier's redirect tool but your shipping does not seem to allow it.

subject: Received wrong item and need to return it
body: My order arrived today but the item inside is completely different from what I ordered. I obviously want to return this and get what I actually paid for.

subject: What is the data retention policy?
body: For compliance reasons I need to understand how long you retain customer data after account deletion and whether we can request full data deletion under GDPR.

subject: Coupon code not applied at checkout
body: I have a valid coupon code SAVE20 but when I enter it at checkout the total does not change. The code is supposed to give 20% off. Please help.

subject: Admin role not showing after upgrade
body: I upgraded my account to the Business plan which should give me admin controls. However my dashboard looks the same as before and I do not see the admin panel.

subject: Partial order received
body: My order contained three items but only two arrived. The packing slip inside lists all three items. The missing item is the most important one I needed.

subject: Bank says charge is from unknown merchant
body: My bank flagged a charge from your company as potentially fraudulent because the merchant name on the statement does not match your company name. Can you provide the exact descriptor?

subject: Data export is stuck at 0%
body: I started a data export 3 hours ago and the progress bar has not moved from 0%. The page just shows 'Preparing export...' I need this data urgently.

subject: Never received shipping confirmation
body: I placed an order five days ago. It was charged to my card but I never received a shipping confirmation or tracking number. My order status still shows 'Processing'.

subject: Bulk import fails with no error message
body: I am trying to import a CSV file with 5,000 rows. The upload completes but then nothing happens — no error, no confirmation, no imported data. The file is formatted exactly as specified.

subject: Need itemized receipt for expense report
body: I need a detailed receipt for my purchase from last Tuesday for my company expense report. The amount was $79.00. Could you email me an itemized version?

subject: Shipment split into multiple packages unexpectedly
body: I ordered one product but received a notification that it will be delivered in 4 separate packages. No one explained why. Will there be additional shipping charges?

subject: Cannot connect to API — getting 401 errors
body: My API integration stopped working this morning. All requests return HTTP 401 Unauthorized. My API key has not changed and was working fine yesterday.

subject: Tracking number not working
body: The tracking number you emailed me (1Z999AA10123456784) does not return any results on the carrier's website. I have been checking for two days.

subject: Webhook not firing on new events
body: I set up a webhook endpoint last week and it was working. As of Monday it is not receiving any POST requests despite new events occurring. The endpoint is responding correctly to pings.

subject: Can reports be scheduled for automatic delivery?
body: I want to set up weekly reports to be automatically emailed to our leadership team every Monday morning. Is this a built-in feature or would I need to use the API?

subject: Permission settings not saving
body: I update the permission settings for a team member and click Save. The page confirms the change but when I reload the permissions are back to what they were before.

subject: App crashes on launch after update
body: Since the update to version 3.2 yesterday, the app crashes immediately when I open it. I am on iPhone 14 running iOS 17. I have tried reinstalling but the problem persists.

subject: Cannot access account after company domain change
body: Our company rebranded and changed our email domain. I now cannot log into the account that was tied to my old email address. I need to access historical data there.

subject: Two-factor authentication code not arriving
body: I enabled 2FA on my account but the verification code is not arriving via SMS. I have waited 15 minutes and tried three times. My phone number is correct in my profile.

subject: Does the API support bulk operations?
body: I need to update thousands of records at once. Does your API have batch endpoints or would I need to make individual calls for each record? What are the rate limits?

subject: Account locked after too many attempts
body: My account appears to be locked. I tried to log in a few times with what I thought was my password and now I just see 'Account temporarily locked'. How long does this last?

subject: Return label not received
body: I requested a return 5 days ago and was told a label would be emailed within 24 hours. I still have not received it. My return window closes in 3 days.

subject: PDF export renders tables incorrectly
body: When I export reports to PDF, the tables are cut off at the right edge. The same report looks fine on screen. I have tried different paper sizes with the same result.

subject: Does your product support SAML SSO?
body: We are evaluating your product for our enterprise. Before we proceed, I need to confirm: does the Business plan support SAML 2.0 SSO with major identity providers like Okta and Azure AD?

subject: Estimated delivery keeps changing
body: The delivery date for my order has changed three times in the past week — first it was Tuesday, then Friday, now next Wednesday. Can you confirm when it will actually arrive?

subject: Maximum number of team members on Starter plan
body: Your pricing page mentions 'up to 5 team members' on the Starter plan. Does that include the account owner or is it 5 additional members on top of the owner?

subject: Annual plan price discrepancy
body: Your website advertises the annual plan at $199/year but I was charged $239. I signed up using the link from your email campaign. Please honor the advertised price.

subject: Return window extended promise not honored
body: A support agent told me via chat (I have the transcript) that my return window would be extended to 60 days due to a delay I experienced. Now the system is rejecting my return saying it is past 30 days.

subject: Item marked as non-returnable but it should not be
body: The product page said 'Free returns within 30 days' but when I try to initiate a return it says this item is non-returnable. I purchased it 12 days ago.

subject: Charged twice for my subscription
body: Hi, I noticed two charges of $29.99 on my credit card for the same month. Could you please refund the duplicate charge? My account email is listed above.
